overall.description: A cinematic night-time journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city district, featuring neon-lit streets, elevated highways, and holographic advertisements. The footage transitions from driving along multi-lane roads to walking on sidewalks, showcasing dense urban environments with pedestrians and futuristic architecture characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road beneath elevated highway

events.description: vehicle passes by on the right side of the road
beginning to slow down and turn right approaching the intersection

agents.ego_description: driving forward on rain-slicked asphalt beneath elevated highway structures, approaching a major intersection with the Arasaka tower visible ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning across the road overhead with support pillars
tall skyscraper with distinctive red neon signage and illuminated windows rising above the city
rain-soaked multi-lane road reflecting neon lights and street lamps
modern glass and steel building with illuminated windows and neon accents
tall commercial building with multiple holographic billboards and signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked multi-lane street beneath massive elevated highway structures. The camera drives forward toward the iconic Arasaka tower visible in the distance, with wet asphalt reflecting the teal and red neon lights of the surrounding cyberpunk architecture. A vehicle passes by on the right as the camera approaches a major intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and digital billboards

events.description: entering the intersection and beginning a right turn
pedestrian in white top and red pants crosses the street from left to right ahead of the camera

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection, executing a right turn while monitoring pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and red pants crossing the street from left to right across the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard displaying an advertisement with a person and 'ALL NIGHT' text
broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes painted on the wet asphalt
large green neon arrow sign pointing left, mounted on a pole at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a major intersection and begins a right turn, revealing a massive digital billboard on the right displaying an 'ALL NIGHT' advertisement. The scene features prominent yellow crosswalk stripes on the wet pavement. A pedestrian in distinctive red pants crosses the street ahead, while the elevated highway structure passes overhead. The environment opens up with more sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection corner with holographic advertisements

events.description: slowing down while navigating the intersection corner
turning left from the street onto the sidewalk with pink neon lighting

agents.ego_description: completing the navigation through the intersection and transitioning onto the sidewalk, slowing to walking speed

entered.detail: large green glowing holographic display showing a human figure, mounted on a street corner structure
tree with pink illuminated cherry blossoms in front of a building facade
black and yellow striped bollard at the corner of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving through the intersection corner, the camera passes a green holographic advertisement and a cherry blossom tree with pink neon lighting. The vehicle slows down as it approaches the sidewalk edge, then turns left onto the pedestrian walkway. The elevated highway structure remains visible overhead while the crosswalk and large billboard recede behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian sidewalk with intense pink neon advertisement walls

events.description: approaching group of pedestrians standing near the pink-lit advertisement wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow neon-lit sidewalk, approaching pedestrians who are standing and interacting with advertisement posters on the wall

notable_agents.action: woman in red outfit with distinctive hairstyle standing and looking at advertisement poster on the wall
woman in white top and dark pants leaning against the wall near the advertisements

entered.detail: concrete sidewalk illuminated by intense magenta and pink neon lights from nearby buildings
wall covered with large illuminated advertisement posters featuring various products and models, bathed in pink neon light
building entrance framed with bright pink neon lighting creating an archway effect
illuminated vending machine visible further down the sidewalk
pile of garbage bags on the sidewalk near the building wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns onto a narrow sidewalk bathed in intense pink and magenta neon light. The environment becomes more enclosed as the camera walks past an advertisement wall covered in illuminated posters. Several pedestrians stand near the wall, including a woman in red examining the advertisements closely. The wet concrete reflects the vivid pink lighting, creating an intimate cyberpunk street-level atmosphere distinct from the open road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, rain-slicked highway journey into an intimate, neon-drenched pedestrian walkway. It begins by driving forward along a multi-lane street beneath massive elevated structures, with the distant Arasaka tower framed by teal and red reflections on the wet asphalt. As the camera enters a major intersection and turns right, the environment opens up to reveal a massive ALL NIGHT digital billboard and a pedestrian in red crossing yellow stripes on the pavement. The scene then shifts past a green holographic advertisement and a pink neon cherry blossom tree before the camera slows and turns left off the road onto the sidewalk. Finally, the perspective becomes more enclosed as it moves through a narrow corridor of intense magenta light, passing an illuminated poster wall and pedestrians on wet concrete.
